designation: Senior Architect / Lead Engineer (AI/ML & Cloud Platform)
summaryPoints: Led development of **frontend-driven document review and validation platform**, enabling real-time editing, validation, and submission workflows using **modern UI architecture patterns**.
Designed and implemented **interactive UI components and dynamic form-based experiences**, improving usability for Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) systems.
Built and integrated **API-driven frontend applications** with FastAPI backend services for seamless data flow and real-time updates.
Implemented **secure authentication mechanisms (SAML-based SSO, token-based access)** ensuring protected access to frontend applications.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define **frontend architecture, component design standards, and UI best practices**.
Deployed applications on **GCP Cloud Run with CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions**, ensuring scalable and reliable releases.
Led **code reviews, technical discussions, and mentoring engineers**, improving frontend code quality and maintainability.
Architected and developed **scalable React.js applications using Hooks, component-based architecture, and modern state management patterns**, supporting high-traffic clinical platforms.
Designed **modular, reusable UI components** and optimized rendering performance, reducing load times by **30%**.
Implemented **secure authentication and authorization flows (JWT, OAuth2, SSO)** across frontend and backend systems.
Built **responsive, user-friendly interfaces** aligned with enterprise design standards, improving user engagement and accessibility.
Integrated frontend applications with **RESTful APIs and microservices**, ensuring seamless data synchronization.
Led **frontend performance optimization initiatives** including lazy loading, code splitting, and efficient state updates.
Established **best practices for React development**, including code reviews, testing strategies, and maintainable architecture.
Automated **CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions**, enabling faster and reliable deployments.
Collaborated closely with product, QA, and design teams to deliver **high-quality user-centric applications**.
Mentored engineers in **React best practices, clean architecture, and frontend scalability**.
Architected and developed **enterprise-scale full-stack applications with a strong focus on React.js-based frontend systems**, enabling scalable and high-performance user experiences.
Designed and implemented **modular, reusable UI component architectures**, improving maintainability and consistency across multiple applications.
Led development of **complex, data-intensive frontend applications**, integrating with backend services via REST APIs and microservices.
Defined and enforced **frontend best practices including component design, state management patterns, performance optimization, and code quality standards**.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (product, QA, UX) to deliver **user-centric, responsive web applications** aligned with business requirements.
Implemented **secure authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth-based systems)** across frontend and backend layers.
Improved application performance through **efficient rendering strategies, optimized API interactions, and frontend performance tuning techniques**.
Played a key role in **modernizing legacy UI systems into React-based architectures**, improving scalability and developer productivity.
Led **code reviews, architectural discussions, and technical mentoring**, increasing team velocity and improving overall code quality.
Spearheaded migration of monolithic systems to **cloud-based microservices architectures (AWS/Azure)**, enabling seamless frontend-backend integration.
Delivered **high-availability applications (99.99% uptime)** with robust frontend and backend design.
Mentored and coached engineers on **React development, clean architecture, and scalable frontend design patterns**, improving onboarding and team efficiency.

**Designed and delivered high-performance software solutions** in collaboration with cross-functional teams, **leading large-scale deployments and integrating third-party tools** (ASP.NET, C#, JS, Telerik).
**Optimized database schemas**, improving performance by **40%** and ensuring **robust application functionality** (SQL).
Enhanced and maintained **ASP.NET & SQL** applications across multiple platforms.
